title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. olympica
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. olympica, also known as alpine skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria rupestris plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Greece. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe various health issues. The health benefits of alpine skullcap include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Alpine skullcap is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine, particularly in the form of dried leaves and roots.
